requirement_text:
Organisation: Feuji Software Solution Pvt. Ltd.
Segment: Healthcare

AI SUGGESTED & EDITED PARAMETERS:
TOOLS AND TECH STACKS: Python, FastAPI, React for frontend development, TensorFlow for machine learning, MongoDB for database management
KNOWLEDGE BASE SOURCES: CDC guidelines, PubMed articles, reputable medical journals
LLM FOUNDATION MODEL: GPT-4 Health, optimized for healthcare applications
PERSONA AND TONE: Empathetic and informative, with a culturally sensitive approach to cater to diverse patient needs
FALLBACK MECHANISMS: Escalation to a human agent for complex queries, re-routing to a comprehensive FAQ section
SUPPORTED LANGUAGES: Primarily Hindi, English, and Spanish to accommodate a wide user base
MULTI MODAL CAPABILITIES: Supports text, voice interactions, and image recognition to enhance user engagement
USER INTERFACE FEATURES: Includes chat message download, prescription download, and microphone input functionalities
EXPECTED OUTCOME: Delivery of reliable medical information, enhancement of patient engagement, and achievement of swift response times
TARGET USER SPECIFICATION: Designed for patients, healthcare providers, and caregivers requiring medical support and inf

acceptance_criteria.then: Validate & sanitise all inputs against the declared schema.
Log every decision/response immutably for audit.
Produce cluster/anomaly assignments with a quality score.
Persist the fitted model + assignment for each input row.

architecture.excerpt:
%% Forge Solution Architecture — MC / Medical Chatbot
%% Derived from SOW + BRD + Backlog + Brief (chatbot)
%% Domains: Cancer Care, Diabetes, Mental Illness, Cardiology, Respiratory
%% Stories: S1, S2, S3, S4, S5, S5

%% C4 Context
flowchart LR
  ACT0(["Patient"])
  ACT1(["Clinician"])
  GW["API Gateway"]
  ORC["MC Orchestrator"]
  ACT0 --> GW
  GW --> ORC
  SAFE["Safety Guardrails"]
  ORC --> SAFE
  AG1["Cancer Care Agent"]
  ORC --> AG1
  AG2["Diabetes Agent"]
  ORC --> AG2
  AG3["Mental Illness Agent"]
  ORC --> AG3
  AG4["Cardiology Agent"]
  ORC --> AG4
  AG5["Respiratory Agent"]
  ORC --> AG5
  RAG["RAG Retriever"]
  ORC --> RAG
  KB["Knowledge: CDC, PubMed, Jira"]
  ORC --> KB
  LLM["LLM Response Composer"]
  ORC --> LLM
  UX["Chat Portal UI"]
  ORC --> UX
  UX --> ACT0
  EXP["Export: Chat + Rx"]
  ORC --> EXP
  MM["Multimodal - Voice Ingest"]
  ORC --> MM
  EXT3["Jira"]
  ORC -.-> EXT3
  EXT4["GitHub"]
  ORC -.-> EXT4

%% Sequence
sequenceDiagram
  participant User
  participant Portal as "Chat Portal"
  participant ORC as "Orchestrator"
  participant SAFE as "Guardrails"
  participant AG as "Cancer Care Agent"
  participant RAG as "RAG Retriever"
  participant KB as "Knowledge Base"
  participant LLM as "LLM Composer"
  User->>Portal: Cancer Care specialty agent + RAG citations
  Portal->>ORC: chat message + language
  ORC->>SAFE: safety / escalation check
  ORC->>AG: route by specialty/domain
  AG->>RAG: retrieve context
  RAG->>KB: query CDC, PubMed
  KB-->>RAG: p
